languages.text:
Корабль остановлен.
Добьем оставшихся во имя Императора!

traits.locale_text:
Корабль остановлен.
Добьем оставшихся во имя Императора!

languages.text: Рокот двигателей затихает. Корабль остановил свое падение в бездну Имматериума.
The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.
languages.original_text: Рокот двигателей затихает. Корабль остановил свое падение в бездну Имматериума.

traits.locale_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.
The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.
The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.
The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.
The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.
The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

languages.text: エンジン音が徐々に収まる。船は非物質世界の深淵への落下を止めた。
languages.original_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

traits.locale_text: エンジン音が徐々に収まる。船は非物質世界の深淵への落下を止めた。

languages.text: Das Grollen der Triebwerke lässt nach. Das Schiff stürzt nicht länger in den Abgrund des Immateriums.
languages.original_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

traits.locale_text: Das Grollen der Triebwerke lässt nach. Das Schiff stürzt nicht länger in den Abgrund des Immateriums.

languages.text: Le grondement des moteurs se tait. La chute du vaisseau dans l'abîme de l'Immaterium s'est interrompu.
languages.original_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

traits.locale_text: Le grondement des moteurs se tait. La chute du vaisseau dans l'abîme de l'Immaterium s'est interrompu.

languages.text: El estruendo de los motores cesa. La nave ha detenido su zambullida hacia el abismo del Inmaterio.
languages.original_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

traits.locale_text: El estruendo de los motores cesa. La nave ha detenido su zambullida hacia el abismo del Inmaterio.

languages.text: 发动机的隆隆声渐渐停了下来，这艘船也不再继续坠入亚空间深处了。
languages.original_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

traits.locale_text: 发动机的隆隆声渐渐停了下来，这艘船也不再继续坠入亚空间深处了。

languages.text: Motorların gürlemesi kesiliyor. Geminin Tindiyar'ın dipsizliğine düşüşü durdu.
languages.original_text: The rumble of the engines dies down. The ship has stopped its fall into the abyss of the Immaterium.

traits.locale_text: Motorların gürlemesi kesiliyor. Geminin Tindiyar'ın dipsizliğine düşüşü durdu.
